content.body:
https://github.com/tc39/how-we-work/blob/main/management.md

Hello editors!  I was updating this page ☝️ to update the editors list and noticed this line:

> The editor group runs on an internal consensus model, requiring the sign-off of each editor to merge a pull request.

My understanding is that, as written, it is not entirely accurate.  Not a big deal, but I defer to you all on how/whether to update it.  🙏
content.formatted_body:
https://github.com/tc39/how-we-work/blob/main/management.md

Hello editors! I was updating this page ☝️ to update the editors list and noticed this line:

The editor group runs on an internal consensus model, requiring the sign-off of each editor to merge a pull request.

My understanding is that, as written, it is not entirely accurate. Not a big deal, but I defer to you all on how/whether to update it. 🙏
